vibe: Objective, rigid, functional, professional, and business-focused.

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight or tracking-tighter).
Labels and overlines must be uppercase with wide tracking.
Hierarchy gap rule: Jump between heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Generous spacing: use 2x-3x more padding inside containers.
Grid children must be direct children.
Containers with borders must have internal padding to prevent text collision.

surfaces.grid_borders: border-collapse style layout for data-heavy sections.

buttons.primary: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-[#002480] transition-colors shadow-sm
buttons.secondary: bg-white border border-zinc-200 text-zinc-900 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 hover:bg-zinc-50 transition-colors
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-zinc-100 text-zinc-700 rounded-sm px-6 py-2.5 transition-colors

rules: Use sharp edges or very subtle roundness (max 6px).
Use 1px crisp borders for definitions rather than relying completely on shadows.
Shadcn components should be overridden to remove Vercel-like large border radii.
Hover states must always explicitly set text and background color.
Use progressive disclosure in the dashboard to reduce cognitive load.

image_urls.description: Mobile app interface mockup for the AI app builder hero section
Laptop displaying a dashboard, useful for the SaaS product showcase section
Bold geometric pattern with triangles for use in CTA banners or feature section backgrounds (with white overlay)
A group of cell phones to demonstrate the multi-platform output capability (Android/iOS)

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the 'Swiss & High-Contrast' archetype: Use stark white backgrounds with crisp black text and Klein Blue (#002FA7) accents.
Do not use generic fonts like Inter for headings. Use Outfit (or similar geometric sans) for headings and IBM Plex Sans for body text.
Implement the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout: tight gaps, full utilization of space, and data-dense cards.
Use Shadcn UI but heavily customize the radius to be crisp (rounded-sm or none) and remove generic drop-shadows in favor of 1px solid borders.
Add data-testid attributes to ALL interactive elements (buttons, forms, links) for testing purposes.
For the web-to-mobile app builder, ensure the workspace layout has progressive disclosure to keep the UI clean while handling complex AI-generation settings.
Integrate provided media URLs in their respective sections. Do not use random placeholders.
Ensure contrast ratios meet or exceed WCAG AA standards, especially on text over image or colored backgrounds.
